description: Crafted for the cosmopolitan male, this bag from cabarelli is made with materials of superior quality. Wear this utilitarian, monochrome bag with formal or casual ensembles, and don't forget to style your outfit with matching accessories. Length: 41 cm Width: 33 cm Depth: 13 cm Made of polyester blend fabric Two main zippered compartments Laptop holder with a click lock in the second compartment One zippered pocket on the front Mesh pockets on both sides of the bag Padded and adjustable shoulder straps A padded haul loop Care Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
